info.name: Affinda Workspaces API
info.description: Affinda Workspaces API — subset of the Affinda v3 Document Processing API.

query.description: Start date of the period to retrieve. Format: YYYY-MM
End date of the period to retrieve. Format: YYYY-MM

request.description:
Return monthly credits consumption of a workspace.
Deprecated: use `GET /v3/usage?organization={id}&workspace={id}` instead. The new endpoint returns a unified daily series and supports the same workspace scoping along with organization- and document-type-level reporting.

response.name: Monthly credits consumption of a workspace.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
